drugs.notes: Calvert formula using calculated GFR (capped at CrCl 125ml/min). Max dose 750mg (set at 790mg in ARIA). AUC4 may be considered with EDTA clearance. Recalculate GFR if serum creatinine >1.5xULN or changes ≥10% from baseline.
Administer in 250ml sodium chloride 0.9% over 60 minutes. Must use non-PVC administration set with in-line 0.22 micron filter. Vesicant.

drugs.notes: Calvert formula using calculated GFR (capped at CrCl 125ml/min). Max dose 900mg (set at 890mg in ARIA). AUC5 may be considered with EDTA clearance. Recalculate if renal function changes >10%.

Administer in 250ml sodium chloride 0.9% over 60 minutes. Doses >200mg dilute in 500ml sodium chloride 0.9% (max concentration 0.74mg/ml). Consider starting dose 55mg/m² in those with poor bone marrow reserves. Exfoliant.

dose_modifications.condition: Day 1: Neutrophils <1x10⁹/L or Platelets <100x10⁹/L — delay 7 days; febrile neutropenia or count delay >7 days (first reduction)
Day 1: Neutrophils <1x10⁹/L or Platelets <100x10⁹/L — delay 7 days; febrile neutropenia or count delay >7 days (first reduction)

Hepatic impairment: Docetaxel Bilirubin >ULN and/or AST/ALT ≥3.5xULN and Alk Phos ≥6xULN

dose_modifications.condition: NCI-CTC grade 3 cutaneous toxicity present on day 1
dose_modifications.notes: Delay until grade ≤1 then reduce from 75mg/m² to 60mg/m². Stop if at 60mg/m² or no recovery in 2 weeks. Stop for grade 4 cutaneous toxicity

dose_modifications.condition: Excessive lacrimation/ocular irritation
dose_modifications.notes: Reduce to 60mg/m² if hypromellose 0.3% eye drops 4 times daily does not control symptoms

pre_medications: Dexamethasone 8mg oral twice daily for 3 days starting 24 hours before docetaxel (or 20mg IV if forgotten)
Ondansetron 8mg oral or IV 15-30 minutes before chemotherapy
Ondansetron 8mg oral twice daily for 3 days starting evening of day 1 (take home)

special_warnings: Neo-adjuvant or adjuvant treatment of triple negative breast cancer
Carboplatin maximum dose 900mg at AUC6 (set at 890mg in ARIA); cap CrCl at 125ml/min
Docetaxel hypersensitivity: do not interrupt for minor symptoms (flushing/rashes); immediately discontinue for severe reactions
Docetaxel-induced fluid retention may cause weight gain — not a reason to alter dose
Recalculate carboplatin dose if renal function changes by >10% between cycles
Consider loperamide 4mg after first loose stool then 2mg after each loose motion (max 48 hours, max 16mg/day)

drugs.notes: Cycles 1-3 only (FE100C phase). Administer as IV bolus over 10 minutes.
Cycles 1-3 only (FE100C phase). Administer as IV bolus over 10 minutes. Maximum lifetime cumulative dose is 900mg/m².
Cycles 1-3 only (FE100C phase). Administer as IV bolus over 10 minutes. All patients must be tested for DPD deficiency before cycle 1.
Cycles 4-7 (docetaxel-pertuzumab-trastuzumab phase). Administer in 250ml sodium chloride 0.9% over 60 minutes. Dose may be increased to 100mg/m² from cycle 5 if 75mg/m² tolerated. Exfoliant.

LOADING DOSE — Cycle 4 only. Administer in 250ml sodium chloride 0.9% over 60 minutes. Observe patient for 60 minutes after first infusion. Dose reductions not permitted — discontinue if not tolerated.

MAINTENANCE DOSE — Cycles 5-21. Administer in 250ml sodium chloride 0.9% over 30 minutes. If interval ≥6 weeks, re-administer loading dose of 840mg. Dose reductions not permitted — discontinue if not tolerated.

LOADING DOSE — Cycle 4 only. Administer in 250ml sodium chloride 0.9% over 90 minutes. Observe patient for 6 hours after first infusion. If missed dose ≤14 days, give usual maintenance dose; if >14 days, re-load at 8mg/kg over 90 minutes. Dose reductions not permitted.
MAINTENANCE DOSE — Cycles 5-21. Administer in 250ml sodium chloride 0.9% over 30 minutes (if first infusion well tolerated). Dose reductions not permitted — discontinue if not tolerated.
